pierce_trace.name: Pierce trace
pierce_trace.description: Rounds punch through one additional target.

homing_trace.name: Homing trace
homing_trace.description: Guidance routines bend shots toward nearby targets.

explosive_trace.name: Explosive trace
explosive_trace.description: Impact routines vent a small splash burst.

vampiric_trace.name: Vampiric trace
vampiric_trace.description: Confirmed kills return a small amount of hull integrity.

flow_velocity_plus.name: Flow-velocity tune
flow_velocity_plus.description: Improves muzzle flow or support-system drive pressure.

flow_size_plus.name: Flow-size tune
flow_size_plus.description: Increases projectile envelope or linked emitter volume.

impulse_budget_plus.name: Impulse reserve
impulse_budget_plus.description: Raises kinetic impulse budget without changing bore size.

armor_plate_plus.name: Armor mass tune
armor_plate_plus.description: Adds recoverable armor volume to plating modules.

bulwark_capacitor.name: Bulwark capacitor
bulwark_capacitor.description: Routes spare support charge into shields.

frame_fundamentals.name: Cadet Kinetic Frame
frame_fundamentals.subtitle: Precision trainer
frame_fundamentals.description: Standard kinetic trainer with balanced recoil and focused shots.
frame_fundamentals.notes: Starter-frame salvage pattern. Guaranteed starter gear remains separate and is never lost.

frame_area_control.name: Area Control Frame
frame_area_control.subtitle: Swarm breaker
frame_area_control.description: Wide plasma spread tuned for interceptor packs.
frame_area_control.notes: Micro-shot salvage pattern for broad lane pressure.

frame_armor_break.name: Armor Break Frame
frame_armor_break.subtitle: Heavy punch
frame_armor_break.description: Large focused kinetic slugs built for plated targets.
frame_armor_break.notes: Pierce-capable salvage pattern for hard targets.

defense_phase_shield.name: Phase Shield
defense_phase_shield.subtitle: Barrier
defense_phase_shield.description: Standard shield projector for a forgiving buffer.
defense_phase_shield.notes: Recovered shield hardware suitable for either defense bay.

defense_heavy_plate.name: Heavy Plate
defense_heavy_plate.subtitle: Plating
defense_heavy_plate.description: Dense armor slab for soaking direct fire.
defense_heavy_plate.notes: Recovered armor hardware suitable for either defense bay.

aux_cloak.name: Cloaking Device
aux_cloak.subtitle: Pilot system
aux_cloak.notes: Recovered auxiliary system. Equips to the support link.

aux_emp.name: EMP Burst
aux_emp.subtitle: Pilot system
aux_emp.description: Disable enemy fire and slow ships briefly.
aux_emp.notes: Recovered auxiliary system. Equips to the support link.

aux_bulwark.name: Bulwark Field
aux_bulwark.subtitle: Pilot system
aux_bulwark.notes: Recovered auxiliary system. Equips to the support link.

relic_blackbox_driver.name: Blackbox Driver
relic_blackbox_driver.subtitle: Pre-Founding hardpoint
relic_blackbox_driver.description: A sealed kinetic driver with an undocumented recoil governor.
relic_blackbox_driver.notes: Recovered before-fleet hardware. Identification creates a permanent archive record.

uniqueProperty.name: Blackbox overclock
uniqueProperty.description: Adds sealed impulse reserve and deeper pierce tuning.

relic_greenline_bloom.description: A plasma emitter that blooms into controlled micro-shot sheets.
relic_greenline_bloom.notes: Recovered before-fleet hardware. Identification creates a permanent archive record.

uniqueProperty.name: Greenline afterburn
uniqueProperty.description: Adds cycling speed and bloom volume to plasma sheets.

relic_cradle_aegis.description: A quiet shield lattice with impossible recovery discipline.
relic_cradle_aegis.notes: Recovered before-fleet hardware. Identification creates a permanent archive record.
